sd

Signed APT repository. Split-horizon DNS + Caddy config from a declarative services.yaml.

Install (Debian / Ubuntu / Raspberry Pi OS)

curl -fsSL https://miista.github.io/homebrew-sd/setup.sh | sudo sh
sudo apt-get install sd

Or do the repo setup explicitly:

# 1. Trust the signing key
curl -fsSL https://miista.github.io/homebrew-sd/sd-archive-keyring.asc \
  | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/sd-archive-keyring.asc > /dev/null

# 2. Add the repo (arch auto-detected)
echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/sd-archive-keyring.asc] https://miista.github.io/homebrew-sd stable main" \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sd.list

# 3. Install
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install sd

Upgrade

sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install --only-upgrade sd

Source: github.com/Miista/homebrew-sd
